snippet.title: To Be Honest 2.0 | Mathira | Tabish Hashmi | Full Episode | Nashpati Prime
snippet.description:
Mathira Mohammad aka Mathira is a Pakistani model, dancer, television hostess, singer and actress. She has hosted several television shows and appeared in music videos shares her journey with our host Tabish Hashmi in 'To Be Honest 2.0' - A juicy and fun gossip show with TV, Film and Digital Celebrities.

Nashpati Prime is an entertainment platform focused on producing premium quality content for our viewers.

Host: Tabish Hashmi
Guest:  Mathira Mohammad

Created by: Azfar Ali
Produced by: Qaiser Ali

Associate Producer: Mohammad Raheel 
Set design by: Zain Mursaleen
Tabish Wardrobe: Custom Cut
Official Photography: Justin George (Jeem G Vision)

Strategic Partner: https://rinstra.com/

#TBH #ToBeHonest #Mathira #TBH #ToBeHonest #TabishHashmi #NashpatiPrime #Nashpati #NashpatiDigital

snippet.title: MARJANEYA - Neha Kakkar | Rubina Dilaik & Abhinav Shukla | Anshul Garg | Babbu | Rajat Nagpal
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Marjaneya by Neha Kakkar ft. Abhinav Shukla & Rubina Dilaik.

Stream the full song here:

Gaana: https://gaana.com/song/marjaneya-1
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/0fZJoLBwD8ja2Hg8tCPImu?si=Uv0zhihaQxSy2b2MoZZMDw&utm_source=whatsapp

Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/in/album/marjaneya-single/1558134197?at=1l3v9Tx&uo=4&app=itunes
YouTube Music: https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=rmc8ijIKpxY&feature=share


Singer - Neha Kakkar
Music - Rajat Nagpal
Lyrics - Babbu
Music arranged & produced by Rajat Nagpal 
Guitars Shomu Seal 
Recorded @ Studio 504 by Rahul Sharma Assist by Samir Dharap

Featuring - Abhinav Shukla & Rubina Dilaik

Producer - Anshul Garg

Video Director - Rajan Bir 
Video Supervisor - Raghav Sharma
Co-Director - Anmol Randhawa 
Dop - Shinda Singh
Project Manager - Piyush Chandak
Choreographer - Sumit Kumar 
Assistant Choreographer- Robin Singh
Editor - Gaurav K Mehra 
Di - Onkar 
VFX - Prathmesh ChaukekarŌĆŗ ,Prathmesh Sampada Parab 
Art Director - Karma Art Studio 
Jimmy Jib - Manish Arora
Production - Fateh Film Production
Abhinav Shukla & Rubina Dilaik Stylist - Ashna Makhijani Shah
Neha's team:
Styled by - Outro  By Akshita & Anulika
Make-up - Ritika Vats
Hair by - Rita Shukla
Photo by - Piyush Mehra
Artwork - Vicky Sandhu
Distribution - Believe Digital
Promotions - Underdog Digital



Lyrics -
Karda rahen ignore ve mainu
Labhgyi lagda hor ve tenu
Je tu pyar naal rakhna hi nahi 
Fer tu vapis tor ve mainu
Ik paasa karde yaar.. Asi tere nahi rehna
Marjaaneya tu hun nahi karda pyar..Asi tere nahi rehna

Tethon ramdev ton ve routine nahi chadya janda
Tu reliance chalauna hain..Tethon time nai kadhya janda
Tethon ramdev ton ve routine nahi chadya janda
Tu reliance chalauna hain..Tethon time nai kadhya janda

Kade bahr laja
Koi film dikha
Kade pyar naal
Koi gal sunaa
Banya rehnaa talwar asi tere nai rehna
Marjaneya
Tu hun nahi karda pyar asi tere nai rehna

Koi labh lyi hou chudail 
Chakkar koi paaya lagda
Sade pichon ve muuh
Kaala karvaaya lagda
Koi labh lyi hou chudail 
Chakkar koi paaya lagda
Sade pichon ve muuh
Kaala karvaaya lagda

Sanu milna nahi 
Milauna nahi
Babbu je pyar
Jatauna nahi
Ki pauna fer achaar Asi tere nahi rehna
Marhanevala
Tu hun nahi karda pyar asi tere nai rehna



#NehaKakkar #RubinaDilaik #AbhinavShukla

snippet.title: The Stolen Necklace | CID | Most Viewed
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/sonypalindia?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch Most Viewed clips:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLfyXOEyr93G2qps16ADXNqjds8djQzTsK

About CID: 
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. the team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues.

#cid
#crime

snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 07 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 19th March 2021

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her familyŌĆÖs class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.
Though Mahi appreciates FarhadŌĆÖs efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win MahiŌĆÖs heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?

Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her familyŌĆÖs class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.

Though Mahi appreciates FarhadŌĆÖs efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win MahiŌĆÖs heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?

Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain

snippet.title: Fitoor - Ep 13 [Eng Sub] - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 18th March 2021 - HAR PAL GEO
snippet.description:
Fitoor - Ep 13 [Eng Sub] - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 18th March 2021 - HAR PAL GEO

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Fitoor Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Fitoor narrates a love story that transcends above all as a person in love is bound to forget about the worries of the past and the uncertainty of the future.
Despite being a successful architect, Haider feels lacking in his love life as he is still living with the memories of his love interest. On the other hand, Dilnasheen who hails from a middle-class background is deeply in love with her best friend's brother Hamza and both vows to be with each other forever without realizing the difficulties they might have to overcome. Living in her present, DilnasheenŌĆÖs life takes an unfortunate turn when she crosses paths with Haider. Will Haider and Dilnasheen be able to forget their past and move on in their lives? Or will the past pay them a visit when they begin to settle down? Will Haider and Dilnasheen be able to distinguish between their past and present?

Written By: Zanjabeel Asim
Directed By: Siraj ul Haq
Produced By: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment

snippet.title: Tapu Sena Ki Masti | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | Tapu Sena Special | ÓżżÓżŠÓż░ÓżĢ Óż«ÓźćÓż╣ÓżżÓżŠ ÓżĢÓżŠ ÓżēÓż▓ÓźŹÓż¤ÓżŠ ÓżÜÓżČÓźŹÓż«ÓżŠ
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh
On-Air Promotion  ( SAB): SAB OAP
Costume Designer: Alka Mehta
Costume Stylist: Ekta Brahmbhatt
Sound Recordist: Shakeel Mansuri 
Cameraman: Aamir Virani
Production Head: Arvind Marchande
Production Controler: Vinod Shishupal
Background Music: Sunil Patni
Online Editors: Vishal Tambe, Sandeep Singh 
Executive Producer: Jatin Yogesh Bajaj
Editor: Dinesh Gosavi, Kaushal Mistry, Devang Modi, Vinod Maurya
Creative Supervision: Krunal Khakhkhar
Operation Head: Sohil Ramani
Written By: Raju Odedra & Rajen Upadhyay
Directors: Harshad Joshi, Malav Suresh Rajda

Television Adaptation and Designed By: Asit Kumarr Modi

snippet.description:
Pehli Si Muhabbat will give you a chance to dive into a world full of love, hate and intense emotions as the story revolves around a young guy who is madly in love with a girl to whom love is supreme and family is superior.

Writer: Faiza Iftikhar  

Director: Anjum Shahzad

Maya Ali,

snippet.title: Aik Qaum, Aik Manzil | Pakistan Day Song | 23rd March 2021 | ISPR
snippet.description:
On 23rd March 1940, Muslims of the Sub-Continent, while exhibiting heights of unity, faith and discipline, passed the historic Resolution for establishment of a separate homeland. 
Muslims shared one vision and were always one in their resolve against all odds.
The song; Aik Qaum, Aik Manzil, highlights the very same ideology of unity, resilience and an indomitable resolve of Pakistanis, 81 years later. 
Compassion, tolerance, brotherhood and the feeling of oneness is the essence, which consolidates Pakistan into one nation, despite being a multi-cultural, multi-ethnic and a multi-religious society.
Renowned singers, Ali Zafar and Aima Baig, have put their heart and soul into this song. 

Credits:-
Singers: Ali Zafar and Aima baig 
Lyricist: Abid Hassan
Composition: Ali Zafar 
Music Producer: Sarmad Ghafoor
Post Production: Mazhar Hussain

#PakistanDay
#23rdMarch2021
#OneNationOneDestiny
#AikQaumAikManzil

ŌŚÅŌŚÅ MANQABAT LYRICS ŌŚÅŌŚÅ 


ŌŚÅMera Aqa, Mera Maula, Mera Sa'een, Mera Daata
Mera Murshad, Mera Malik, Mera Qibla, Mera Ka'baa

ŌŚÅYa Hussain!

ŌŚÅYe Dunya ho ya woh Dunya, Mera Maula Hussain he
Mera Murshad Hussain he, Mera Malik Hussain he

ŌŚÅMaula Maula mere, Maula Maula Mere, Mere Maula, Mere Maula

ŌŚÅNoke sina pe tu ne Quran sunaya he
La ilaha ill-Allah ko tu ne bachaya he
Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula

ŌŚÅAvaaz ye kalma deta he, mera kalma Hussain he!
Mera Murshad Hussain he, Mera Malik Hussain he

ŌŚÅLawh-o-Qalam ka Malik, Zahra ka laal he
Fitrus ka istekhara, Rahib ka faal he
Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula
Hur ne ye kaha milta he Khuda, jise milta Hussain he

ŌŚÅKar midhate Hussain, issi me nijaat he
Dunya e be-sabaat ka in se sabaat he
Be ayb Haq ki zaat he, ya in ki zaat he
Hukm inka aur kalam-e-majeed ek baat he
Us manzil e niyaaz ke Salik Hussain he
Jab tak Khuda ka Mulk he, Malik Hussain he
Sarkar e Dabeer ne farmaya, mera Maula Hussain he
Mera Murshad Hussain he, Mera Malik Hussain he

ŌŚÅMaula Maula mere, Maula Maula Mere, Mere Maula, Mere Maula

ŌŚÅArfe diye riwayat, Sattar hazaar hajj,
Ehram kale paa ke, Kaynde zawar ajj
Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula
Az karbobala de HajiyaaN, Sada Makkah Hussain ay
Mera Murshad Hussain ay, Mera Malik Hussain ay

ŌŚÅRang o nasal di koi, tafreek na rayi
Matam di saff te aa ke, koi bhi ghayr nayi
Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula
Sada matamdar qabila ay, sada rishta Hussain ay
Mera Murshad Hussain ay, Mera Malik Hussain ay

ŌŚÅMaula Maula mere, Maula Maula Mere, Mere Maula, Mere Maula

ŌŚÅKaram Hussain ka mujh par mazeed ho jaye
Marun jo farsh e aza par toh Eid ho jaye
Ajeeb jazba he har Maa du'aaein karti he
Khuda kare mera bachha shaheed ho jaye
Har maa ne kaha mera baccha, tera sadqa Hussain he
Mera Murshad Hussain he, Mera Malik Hussain he

ŌŚÅDunya me Shah ka sajda sajdon ka taaj he
Nabiyon ke sab sajdon par is ka hi raaj he
Khud khana e kaaba kehta he mera Qibla Hussain he
Mera Murshad Hussain he, Mera Malik Hussain he

ŌŚÅMaula Maula mere, Maula Maula Mere, Mere Maula, Mere Maula

ŌŚÅIn jayse kitne tere Ashiq mazeed hein
Khwaja, Bhittai, Baahu tere mureed hein
Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula
Jisse Laal Qalandar kehte hein tera banda Hussain he
Mera Murshad Hussain he, Mera Malik Hussain he

ŌŚÅMere dil ke andar Hussain, Hussain
Mere ruh ka mehvar Hussain, Hussain
Dosh-e-Nabi ka sawaar he
Wo naaz parwardigaar he
Fatima ka chayn he
Woh Nabi ka Noor e ayn he
Woh Ba-Khuda Hussain he

ŌŚÅJera Nabi da pyara Zahra da chayn ay
Waris wasila saada bass o Hussain ay
Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula

ŌŚÅAkbar, te Takallum kende ne
Sanu denda Hussain ay
Bolo bolo jhulay Laal Qalandar mast
Jivay sa'eeyaaN, jivay sa'eeyyaaN
Laal Qalandar jhule, Jhule murshid sakhi
Tere mere ishq qalandar, Laal qalandar jivay
Dama-dam Mast qaladar, Sakhi

ŌŚÅNoor aur noori qabila tera
Hasan Hussain wasila tera
Waliyon ka sardar, jivay sa'eeyyaaN
Laal Qalandar jhule, Jhule murshid sakhi
Tere mere ishq qalandar, Laal qalandar jivay
Dama-dam Mast qaladar, Sakhi
Haye Murshad Laal Sakhi

ŌŚÅAvaaz ye kalma deta he, mera kalma Hussain he!
Mera Murshad Hussain he, Mera Malik Hussain he

ŌŚÅLawh-o-Qalam ka Malik, Zahra ka laal he
Fitrus ka istekhara, Rahib ka faal he
Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula
Hur ne ye kaha milta he Khuda, jise milta Hussain he

ŌŚÅKar midhate Hussain, issi me nijaat he
Dunya e be-sabaat ka in se sabaat he
Be ayb Haq ki zaat he, ya in ki zaat he
Hukm inka aur kalam-e-majeed ek baat he
Us manzil e niyaaz ke Salik Hussain he
Jab tak Khuda ka Mulk he, Malik Hussain he
Sarkar e Dabeer ne farmaya, mera Maula Hussain he
Mera Murshad Hussain he, Mera Malik Hussain he

ŌŚÅMaula Maula mere, Maula Maula Mere, Mere Maula, Mere Maula

ŌŚÅArfe diye riwayat, Sattar hazaar hajj,
Ehram kale paa ke, Kaynde zawar ajj
Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula
Az karbobala de HajiyaaN, Sada Makkah Hussain ay
Mera Murshad Hussain ay, Mera Malik Hussain ay

ŌŚÅRang o nasal di koi, tafreek na rayi
Matam di saff te aa ke, koi bhi ghayr nayi
Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula
Sada matamdar qabila ay, sada rishta Hussain ay
Mera Murshad Hussain ay, Mera Malik Hussain ay

ŌŚÅMaula Maula mere, Maula Maula Mere, Mere Maula, Mere Maula

ŌŚÅKaram Hussain ka mujh par mazeed ho jaye
Marun jo farsh e aza par toh Eid ho jaye
Ajeeb jazba he har Maa du'aaein karti he
Khuda kare mera bachha shaheed ho jaye
Har maa ne kaha mera baccha, tera sadqa Hussain he
Mera Murshad Hussain he, Mera Malik Hussain he

ŌŚÅDunya me Shah ka sajda sajdon ka taaj he
Nabiyon ke sab sajdon par is ka hi raaj he
Khud khana e kaaba kehta he mera Qibla Hussain he
Mera Murshad Hussain he, Mera Malik Hussain he

ŌŚÅMaula Maula mere, Maula Maula Mere, Mere Maula, Mere Maula

ŌŚÅIn jayse kitne tere Ashiq mazeed hein
Khwaja, Bhittai, Baahu tere mureed hein
Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula
Jisse Laal Qalandar kehte hein tera banda Hussain he
Mera Murshad Hussain he, Mera Malik Hussain he

ŌŚÅMere dil ke andar Hussain, Hussain
Mere ruh ka mehvar Hussain, Hussain
Dosh-e-Nabi ka sawaar he
Wo naaz parwardigaar he
Fatima ka chayn he
Woh Nabi ka Noor e ayn he
Woh Ba-Khuda Hussain he

ŌŚÅJera Nabi da pyara Zahra da chayn ay
Waris wasila saada bass o Hussain ay
Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula, Hussain Maula

ŌŚÅAkbar, te Takallum kende ne
Sanu denda Hussain ay
Bolo bolo jhulay Laal Qalandar mast
Jivay sa'eeyaaN, jivay sa'eeyyaaN
Laal Qalandar jhule, Jhule murshid sakhi
Tere mere ishq qalandar, Laal qalandar jivay
Dama-dam Mast qaladar, Sakhi

ŌŚÅNoor aur noori qabila tera
Hasan Hussain wasila tera
Waliyon ka sardar, jivay sa'eeyyaaN
Laal Qalandar jhule, Jhule murshid sakhi
Tere mere ishq qalandar, Laal qalandar jivay
Dama-dam Mast qaladar, Sakhi
Haye Murshad Laal Sakhi

snippet.description:
If your kids have been giving you a hard time lately, we sympathize with you. Being a parent is not an easy task, but itŌĆÖs so rewarding! So, today we have some hacks we want to share with you to give you a helping hand. YouŌĆÖll learn a few quick fixes for everyday problems, DIY versions of necessary devices, and cute ideas for outfits. Toddlers can be sneaky and quick, so we have a DIY playpen you can use to keep them in one place while during playtime.

Not knowing what to wear can be a huge time-drainer. So weŌĆÖll show you an awesome hack to help you save time when getting your little ones ready. No baby monitor? No problem! You can use your tablet and your phone to set up a monitoring system to keep an eye on your kiddos. Ironing mishaps can happen you anyone, but that burned shirt might make a great kiddie apron!

snippet.description:

Hussain Hai Naa | Mir Hasan Mir | New Manqabat 2021 | 3 Shaban Manqabat | Imam Hussain Manqabat 2021

Manqabat Title | Ōśå HUSSAIN (as) HAI NAA Ōśå
Recited By | Mir Hasan Mir
Poet | Mir Takallum

Special Thanks | Ali Hamza
Audio | MS Studio- Mehdi

ALBUM 2014 Manqabat
Ō¢║ https://goo.gl/ktyoe4ŌĆŗŌĆŗŌĆŗ
ALBUM 2013 Manqabat
Ō¢║ https://goo.gl/BQ2w8g

****************************

ŌŚÅŌŚÅ MANQABAT LYRICS ŌŚÅŌŚÅ 

ŌŚÅHussain hai na

ŌŚÅKhuda Se Kehne Lagi Yeh Zehra
Hussain Hai Naa

ŌŚÅTeri Shariat Ko Kaisa Khatra
Hussain Hai Naa

ŌŚÅKaha khuda ne rasool jao
Jahan ko yeh asool dedo
Hussain jab tak bhi pusht pe hai
Tum apne sajdon ko tool dedo
Tumhara sajdaa.... Bacha rahega
Hussain Hai Naa

ŌŚÅKhayal choton ka kis tarha se
Baron ne rakha hai yeh batana
Rasool zer e kisa thy jis dam
Hassan ne zehra ne murtaza ne 
Thaher ke pehle.... Nabi se pucha
Hussain Hai Naa

ŌŚÅJo dekha maathe pe daag e sajda
Tou sheikh se boli unki zoja
Janab sub kheriat to hai na
Taweel itna Kiya hai sajdaa
Wo bole jal ker....Aray wo bacha
Hussain Hai Naa

ŌŚÅUlatdi nanni si aastine
Qamar mai rumal uski bandha
Nazar utari nazar se apni
Ali ki beti ne phir yeh bola
Rabab Dekho..... tumhara beta
Hussain Hai Naa

ŌŚÅKhuda se Zainab Ka tha yeh waada
Yazeed jitna bhi dam laga le
Azan hogi namaz hogi
Wo chahe no lakh ko bula le
Gira sakega.....na tera Kaaba
Hussain Hai Naa

ŌŚÅJalal Mai jab Ali Ka beta
Chala Jo taigh e Ali ko tole
Ajeeb baghdar thi Karbala mai
Sawar ik dusre se bole
Tere bhi peche.....are batana
Hussain Hai Naa

ŌŚÅNa wo kisi se hua hai paida
Na koi bhi use hoga paida
Ye shart touheed hai nuseri
Bata ke ab tera Kiya banega
Tere khuda ka...to aik beta
Hussain hai na

ŌŚÅWo sub balaaon ko taal dega
Wo  mushkilon se nikal dega
Khilaf chahe ho sari dunya
Wo khud akaila sambhal lega
Ali ke shion....tumhara maula
Hussain hai na

ŌŚÅUdaas betha hai kyun musalman
Nahi ager Haj ki istetahat
To jaa abhi Karbala Chala jaa
Khuloos se dil mai karke niyat
Bagair Haj bhi....Tu haaji hoga
Hussain hai na

ŌŚÅKhuda ki izzat rakhi hai jis ne
Milegi mujh ko wahin se izzat
Uthalo dolat uthalo sohrat
Nahi taqallum ko Kuch zarurat
Haseen dunya.....Ka Kia karunga
Hussain hai na

****************************

Wo  mushkilon se nikal dega
Khilaf chahe ho sari dunya
Wo khud akaila sambhal lega
Ali ke shion....tumhara maula
Hussain hai na

ŌŚÅUdaas betha hai kyun musalman
Nahi ager Haj ki istetahat
To jaa abhi Karbala Chala jaa
Khuloos se dil mai karke niyat
Bagair Haj bhi....Tu haaji hoga
Hussain hai na

ŌŚÅKhuda ki izzat rakhi hai jis ne
Milegi mujh ko wahin se izzat
Uthalo dolat uthalo sohrat
Nahi taqallum ko Kuch zarurat
Haseen dunya.....Ka Kia karunga
Hussain hai na

****************************

snippet.title: DON 2 FULL MOVIE | SHAH RUKH KHAN
snippet.description:
DON 2 FULL MOVIE | SHAH RUKH KHAN

Don 2 (also known as Don: The King Is Back) is a 2011 Indian Hindi-language action thriller film written, co-produced and directed by Farhan Akhtar. It is the second installment in the Don series. Jointly produced by Excel Entertainment and Red Chillies Entertainment, the film stars Shah Rukh Khan, Priyanka Chopra, Lara Dutta, Om Puri, Boman Irani and Kunal Kapoor. A sequel to the 2006 film Don (2006), Don 2 takes place five years after the previous film when titular character (Khan) plans to take over the European drug cartel. Meanwhile, Roma (Chopra) has joined the Interpol to hunt him down.

The film's music was composed by ShankarŌĆōEhsaanŌĆōLoy, while Javed Akhtar wrote the lyrics. Jason West served as the film's cinematographer and Ritesh Soni was its editor. After the success of the first film, Akhtar had planned a sequel in 2010 which did not work out. It was then officially announced in early 2010, with filming scheduled to begin in later that year. Principal photography took place in Berlin, where it was shot extensively.

Don 2 was released on 23 December 2011 in 2D and 3D formats, which also included dubbed versions in Telugu and Tamil languages. The film had a mixed to positive reception from critics, receiving praise for the cast's performance, cinematography, production design and action sequences. However, its pace and music received criticism. With a box office gross of over Ōé╣275.97 crore (US$39 million), Don 2 was a Big box office success. At the time of its release, the film was one of the highest-grossing Indian films of all time and is the highest-grossing Indian film of 2011. The film received a number of accolades across various ceremonies in India. The film received five nominations at the 57th Filmfare Awards, including Best Film, Best Director for Akhtar and Best Actor for Khan, winning Best Sound Design and Best Action.

snippet.title: MESUM ABBAS - NEW MANQABAT 2021 | Chalte Chalte | 3 Shaban
snippet.description:
Chalte Chalte (Official Video) - Mesum Abbas New Manqabat 2021

ŌĆ£MAIN SUAY KARBALA JARAHA THA...ŌĆØ

Listen to The 1st Ever Manqabat for Mola Imam Hussain (as) by Mesum Abbas 2021.

"Karbala Chalte ChalteŌĆØ

Lyrics:

Mai Suye Karbala Jaa Raha Tha Parhta Salle Ala Chalte Chalte
Peeraha Tha Mawadat Ke Saaghar, Araha Tha Maza... Chalte Chalte...

1. Shahe Karbobala Ki Ziyarat Karne Nikla Tha Mai Apne Gharse
Jo Qaza Hogayeen Theen Namaze, Hogayeen Vo Ada... Chalte Chalte...

2. Kuch Qadam Hur Barha Sheh Ki Jaanib, Kuch Qadam Sheh Barhe Hur Ki Jaanib
Bakhshdi Chand Lamhon Mai Sheh Ne, Hur Ki Saari Khata... Chalte Chalte...

3. Bughz e Haider The Seene May Jiske, Vo Tawaf e Haram Kar Raha Tha
Aayi Taqdeer Chakkar Mai Aisi, Seedha Dozakh Gaya... Chalte Chalte...

4. Shahe Konain Zainab Ke Bhai, Tumne Tauheed Aise Bachayi
Dhoondne Nikla Jo Bhi Khuda Ko, Agaya Karbala... Chalte Chalte...

5. Ae Yazeed Ab Tujhe Qaid Karne, Tauq o Zanjeer Bairi Uthaye
Dekh Shair e Ilahi Ka Beta, Shaam Tak Agaya... Chalte Chalte...

6. Horahi Thi Dhamak Is Bala Ki, Ruk Gayeen Saansain Ahle Jafa Ki
Karke Dhak Dhak Vilayi Ke Dil Ne, Aisa Matam Kiya... Chalte Chalte...

7. Fakhr Se Bolay Gohar Se Mesum, Har Ghari Har Nafas Dam Hamadam
Jhoom Utheygi Saari Khudayi, Vo Karainge Sana... Chalte Chalte...


Special Cooperation: Chundun Fayzabaade
CHALTE CHALTE - Mesum Abbas | Manqabat Imam Hussain | 2021
Reciter: Mesum Abbas Naqvi 
Poet: Gohar Jarchvi
Arrangement: M. Aamir Qureshi & Rizwan Mirza
Backing Vocals: Rizwan Mirza - Mesum Abbas
Audio Recordist: M. Ovais Qureshi (ODS - Karachi)
Mixed & Mastered: M. Omar Qureshi 
DOP: Saroj B. 
Editor & Post Production: Ali Arman Baltistani (TNA Productions)
Cover Design: Yawer Damani
Sarparast: Syed Baqar Naqvi

India Alert Ep: 491 Bahu, Sasur aur Woh
This episode of India Alert the #story revolves around a senior person named Brij. Who was salacious by nature and due to this he forced on her daughter-in-law Mansha. She managed to escape him and called her #husband to inform about it. Movie Title - Meri Jaan (Jaanu)
Starring - Yash, Deepa Sannidhi
Director - Preetham Gubbi
Genre - Hindi Action-Romance Movie

SYNOPSIS:
Meri Jaan (Jaanu) is a 2015 Hindi Dubbed action-romance film directed by Preetham Gubbi and produced by Jayanna combines. Yash and Deepa Sannidhi are the lead actors while Rangayana Raghu, Sadhu Kokila, Shobaraj among others play the supporting roles. V. Harikrishna is the score and soundtrack composer.

Casting:
Deepa Sannidhi, a much sought after actress with two hits in the last year - Saarathi and Paramathma is in her third film with Yash. Rangayana Raghu, Shobaraj, Sangeetha, Madhu, Sadhu Kokila, Layendra are also in the supporting cast.

Box Office:
Jaanu was a much anticipated film and got a good opening at the box office, due to hit songs and youth fan following of Yash. But the film met with mixed response upon release, although it went on to be commercially successful at the box office by completing 50 days of run.

Development:
Following the debacle of Haage Summane and success of Johny Mera Naam Preethi Mera Kaam, Preetham Gubbi teamed up yet again with the Jayanna combines banner. Jayanna and Bogendra were producers for his earlier films too.

#yash #yashhindidubbedmovie #yashnewmovie #2021

Movie Title - Meri Jaan (Jaanu)
Starring - Yash, Deepa Sannidhi
Director - Preetham Gubbi
Genre - Hindi Action-Romance Movie

SYNOPSIS:
Meri Jaan (Jaanu) is a 2015 Hindi Dubbed action-romance film directed by Preetham Gubbi and produced by Jayanna combines. Yash and Deepa Sannidhi are the lead actors while Rangayana Raghu, Sadhu Kokila, Shobaraj among others play the supporting roles. V. Harikrishna is the score and soundtrack composer.

Casting:
Deepa Sannidhi, a much sought after actress with two hits in the last year - Saarathi and Paramathma is in her third film with Yash. Rangayana Raghu, Shobaraj, Sangeetha, Madhu, Sadhu Kokila, Layendra are also in the supporting cast.

Box Office:
Jaanu was a much anticipated film and got a good opening at the box office, due to hit songs and youth fan following of Yash. But the film met with mixed response upon release, although it went on to be commercially successful at the box office by completing 50 days of run.

Development:
Following the debacle of Haage Summane and success of Johny Mera Naam Preethi Mera Kaam, Preetham Gubbi teamed up yet again with the Jayanna combines banner. Jayanna and Bogendra were producers for his earlier films too.

#yash #yashhindidubbedmovie #yashnewmovie #2021

Is kahani mein hum aapko parlok ki sair karayenge, thoda sa darr lagega par bahut sara hansayenge. Masterji ki class mein attendance lagao aur bakiyon ko bhi le kar aao.

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - Ep 3122 - Full Episode - 15th March, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chasmah Episodes: https://youtube.com/channel/UC54_ux4BnaJwkVFn5M391XQ?sub_confirmation=1

Episode 3122: 
-----------------------
While Gokuldham members enter the society gate dancing, Chalu Pandey sees them and makes them stop because Bhogilal had called him and filed a false complaint against Jethalal. Chalu Pandey questions Jethalal and others and takes Bhogilal's side. Jetha explains to him the entire scenario and proven Pandey Ji the video. What will happen next? Watch the full episode now.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

Gutt kabbi khana toh marodya ni jana ,
pahila jede saan vajde , 
picho chalde bhaar kahinde latta te,
Kon kahinda jatt maade aa ,
hunde vair paaye maade bass jatta de,


Dass keda aa vangarda , hune jatt thalda,
Mosam de saab naa ldaayi munda bhalda,
Mare na zameer kyoki ziddi jatt jyonde ne,
Ginti ch nio heere gaddara ch aunde ne,
Mode arrbi bandook awe teda takk na,
Kammm hustle aundi jithe aunda lakh na,
Jado jado jatt jud Saab lagde ne bottla de datta de , 
kon kahinda jatt maade aa , 
hunde vair paaye maade bs jatta de.

snippet.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and HarryŌĆÖs Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial. 

#HarryandMeghan
#COVID19
#GeorgeFloyd

00:00 The National for March 7, 2021
01:06 Harry and Meghan's Oprah interview
06:32 Multiple donors for same WE Charity project
09:28 Vaccines wonŌĆÖt be end of masks, distancing,
11:36 Canada's COVID-19 vaccine rollout 
12:14 Ontario pharmacies vaccine pilot project 
14:19 Easing COVID-19 restrictions 
14:41 Rally for return of youth sports in Quebec 
16:51 Questions about DHL 'hidden fees'
19:16 Violence continue to escalate in Myanmar
19:40 Pope preaches peace during Iraq visit 
22:55 George Floyd murder trial 
27:46 COVID-19 Pandemic: One Year Later 
28:21 What year two of the pandemic might look like
31:19 Helping seniors access COVID-19 vaccines
34:30 Alberta MLA monitored by police
43:30 Shell Alberta to use robotic dogs

The National is CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism, with hosts Adrienne Arsenault and Andrew Chang in Toronto, Ian Hanomansing in Vancouver and the CBC's chief political correspondent, Rosemary Barton in Ottawa.

snippet.title: Baalveer Returns - Ep 309 - Full Episode - 26th February, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of Baalveer Returns: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Yx-rSymwv5NSIsaQ0RwDK_

Episode 309: Vivan Became Unconscious
--------------------------------------------------------
Vivan became unconscious of the unknown Villen is trying to take all power of Vivan. Baalveer and Ananya successfully started the airplane and they are all set to leave the island. watch the full episode now.

About Baalveer Returns:
---------------------------------------
After Pari-lok, the home of benevolent fairies was destroyed by a mighty evil, Timnasa. Baalveer takes shelter in Veer-lok along with a few Paris who had survived the massacre. There, under the guidance of the wise old white lion Shaurya, Baalveer and Pari's are instructed to find the successor of Baalveer at the earliest, since he was immensely injured during the war and will need to team up a new Baalveer to further fight the battle with evil. This search for the next Baalveer takes them to earth, where they discover Vivan, who lives in an old society of Mumbai. He is the naughtiest kid, an ardent fan of Salman Khan, and a non-believer of Baalveer and his powers. This adds to the misery of Baalveer because unfortunately, this undisciplined, non-believer kid is the real successor of Baalveer. What follows is the challenging journey of Baalveer and his team to make Vivaan the next Baalveer with some eccentric characters, childish games and lots of magic on earth and the respective loks, while the imminent threat of Timnasa and the mystery behind her origin continues to play a part.

#baalveerreturns #baalveer

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - Ep 3120 - Full Episode - 11th March, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chasmah Episodes: https://youtube.com/channel/UC54_ux4BnaJwkVFn5M391XQ?sub_confirmation=1

Episode 3120: 
-----------------------
Bagha comes into Gokuldham society and sees Bhogilal's car. He thinks that Bhogilal has come to return Jethalal's 50 Lakh rupees. Bhogilal was about to close the land deal when Bagha entered the room. Bhogilal immediately recognized him. Taarak tries to handle the situation but Bhogilal comes to know about Jethalal's Plan. Watch the full episode now.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.
